svg.title: 3.5-Week Building Energy ML Project Roadmap
svg.desc: A week-by-week roadmap showing tasks, check-ins, and deliverables for the building energy ML semester project

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about loading and inspecting the Energy Efficiency dataset')
sendPrompt('What EDA should we run on the building energy dataset?')
sendPrompt('How do we implement the ASHRAE baseline for building energy?')
sendPrompt('How should we split the building energy dataset for training and testing?')

g.text: ✓ Check-in 1 — EDA findings + baseline RMSE on test set

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do we train Ridge and Lasso regression on the building energy dataset?')
sendPrompt('How do polynomial features help predict building energy loads?')
sendPrompt('How do we train a Random Forest on the building energy dataset?')
sendPrompt('What metrics should we use to compare ML models on the building energy project?')
g.text: RMSE + R² for Y1 and Y2
✓ Check-in 2 — Model comparison table, best model so far

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do we extract and visualize feature importances from the Random Forest?')
g.text: Which features drive heating vs cooling?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Should we try Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) on the building energy dataset?')
sendPrompt('How do we run residual and error analysis on our building energy models?')
sendPrompt('How do we validate building energy predictions against the DOE BPD dataset?')

g.text: ✓ Check-in 3 — Final model chosen, error analysis complete

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the final project report include for the building energy ML project?')
sendPrompt('How do we structure the final presentation for the ML project?')
sendPrompt('What figures and plots should we include in the final submission?')
g.text: RMSE bar chart, feature importance plot

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should we double-check before final submission of the building energy project?')
